headline: Lennox International (LII) Looks Fairly Valued After A 15% 3 Month Gain
summary: Lennox International stock performance snapshot Lennox International (LII) has drawn fresh attention after recent trading left the stock at a last close of $558.57, with investors weighing its current valuation against historical total returns. Over the past month, Lennox International has returned 5.72%, with the past 3 months showing a 14.67% gain and year to date performance at 11.96%. The 1 year total return declined 7.75%, while the 3 year and 5 year total returns are 73.10% and 87.59%...
